title: Pumpkins+
description: Adds many new carved pumpkins with optifine's CIT feature
body:
THIS PACK REQUIRES OPTIFINE OR CITRESEWN (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn/files/3452917)

Discord Server: https://discord.gg/WCvwtzW
This is a CIT pack that remodels pumpkins based on what the carved pumpkin is renamed to.

This pack adds over 150 new pumpkin renames! to see them all, please access this world download:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JQGutGKSlz8SOe59sSfhQ_p3MJ9Woj9n/view?usp=sharing


Textures made by dbrighthd, Fishysalmon02, Mistykitty33418 and SwiftShadowFox

Special thanks to DevlinTheStrange for the cowboy hat, gladiator helmet, and wizard hat.
